Plumbing in Shively, KY

Trusted local professionals serving Shively and surrounding communities

Serving Shively, KY

K&Y Services LLC provides expert plumbing services to the Shively, Kentucky area. We are committed to serving the residents and businesses of Shively with top-quality plumbing solutions and exceptional customer service. Our team is equipped to handle any plumbing challenge, big or small. Whether you require routine maintenance, emergency repairs, or new plumbing installations, K&Y Services LLC is here for you. We pride ourselves on our prompt response times, transparent pricing, and dedication to customer satisfaction. Trust us for all your plumbing needs in Shively.

Shively is a city with a strong sense of community and a rich industrial history. K&Y Services LLC is proud to serve the plumbing needs of this hardworking area.
